description_long: A young adult male stands upright, dressed in a long, double-breasted trench coat layered over a hooded sweatshirt. He wears fitted pants tucked into sturdy lace-up combat boots, and his hands are covered with fingerless gloves. His facial features are clean-shaven, and he has short, textured hair styled upward. The coat features visible lapels, metallic buttons, and wrist straps, giving a modern, urban look. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable, streetwise individual prepared for cool weather in an urban environment.
description: A young adult male in a long trench coat, hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, combat boots, and fingerless gloves, standing upright with a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, coat lapels, layered clothing, and fingerless gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, coat length, and boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hood, back of the coat, and the stance of the legs and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, coat fit, and glove details.
attribute_clothing_type: long trench coat over hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, fingerless gloves
